title: FLASHBACK — Dad walking cobblestone street with backpack
prompt: @young_Papa walking toward camera down the cobblestone street, brown leather backpack on his shoulders, small DSLR camera in his right hand at hip. Autumn maple leaves drifting from above. Charming European cafe storefronts framing both sides, warm afternoon light. @young_Papa's HEAD TURNS slightly to look at a cafe sign, mouth SMILES. He pauses. @young_Papa's right HAND REACHES for the brass door handle of the cafe, the warm interior light glows through the window.
